expired_desc:
Thanks for using JackRabbit. Your subscription has expired.
Please contact us to renew your subscription.
unautorized_desc: You are not authorized to perform the action.
name: Name
admin_block_desc: Administration Console can only be used on desktop devices.
permission_ss_dlod_self: Download the self-signed file - Sign yourself
permission_ss_dlod_others: Download the signed file that created by team members - Sign yourself
permission_ci_dlod_inprocess_others_send: Download the raw file of incomplete signing tasks - Sent by team members
permission_ci_dlod_inprocess_self_sender: Download the raw file of incomplete signing tasks - Sent by the users themselves
permission_ci_dlod_inprocess_others_sign: Download the raw file of incomplete signing tasks - Waiting for team members to sign
permission_ci_dlod_inprocess_self_signer: Download the raw file of incomplete signing tasks - Waiting for themselves to sign
permission_ci_dlod_completed_others_send: Download the signed file of completed signing tasks - Sent by team members
permission_ci_dlod_completed_self_sender: Download the signed file of completed signing tasks - Sent by the users themselves
permission_ci_dlod_completed_others_sign: Download the signed file of completed signing tasks - Request team members to sign
permission_ci_dlod_completed_self_signer: Download the signed file of completed signing tasks - Request users themselves to sign
permission_ci_dlod_audit_others_sender: Download the audit trail of completed signing tasks - Sent by team members
permission_ci_dlod_audit_self_sender: Download the audit trail of completed signing tasks - Sent by users themselves
permission_ci_dlod_audit_others_signer: Download the audit trail of completed signing tasks - Request team members to sign
permission_ci_dlod_audit_self_signer: Download the audit trail of completed signing tasks - Request users themselves to sign
permission_ci_bulk_send: Bulk Send the signing request to multiple signers at one time
permission_share_combination: Share Signer Groups with the team
